parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    $1::text AS project_slug,
    $2::text AS project_name
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO projects (slug, name)
  SELECT i.project_slug, i.project_name
  FROM input i
  ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id, slug, name
),
selected AS (
  SELECT p.id, p.slug, p.name
  FROM projects p
  JOIN input i ON p.slug = i.project_slug
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted)
)
SELECT
  id::text AS project_id,
  slug,
  name,
  CASE
    WHEN source_row = 'inserted' THEN 'created'
    ELSE 'existing'
  END AS status
FROM (
  SELECT id, slug, name, 'inserted'::text AS source_row FROM inserted
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, slug, name, 'selected'::text AS source_row FROM selected
) resolved
LIMIT 1;
